title: Donald Trump Sends Out Embarrassing New Year's Eve Message; This is Disturbing
text: Donald Trump just couldn't wish all Americans a Happy New Year and leave it at that. Instead, the article says he gave a shout out to his enemies, haters, and the fake news media. The piece frames his holiday message as petty and unpresidential and includes reactions from critics on social media.

title: As U.S. budget fight looms, Republicans flip their fiscal script
text: Washington lawmakers were preparing for a budget fight in early 2018. The report says Republicans pushed tax cuts that would increase debt while also calling for spending restraint. It describes tensions over military spending, domestic programs, immigration, and disaster aid.
